heading: Depositaries for collections
label: 7808 Depositaries for collections
text: The Secretary is authorized to designate one or more depositaries in each State for the deposit and safe-keeping of the money collected by virtue of the internal revenue laws; and the receipt of the proper officer of such depositary to the proper officer or employee of the Treasury Department for the money deposited by him shall be a sufficient voucher for such Treasury officer or employee in the settlement of his accounts.
notes: Amendments1976— struck out “or his delegate” after “Secretary”.Pub. L. 94–455
amendments: Amendments1976— struck out “or his delegate” after “Secretary”.Pub. L. 94–455
